surface_forms: Life in Budapest in the early '90s
description: capital and largest city of Hungary
description_wiki: Budapest is the capital and most populous city of Hungary.
Hungary is a landlocked country in Central Europe.

Communism (from Latin  communis 'common, universal') is a political and economic ideology whose goal is the creation of a communist society, a socioeconomic order centered on common ownership of the means of production, distribution, and exchange that allocates products in society based on need.

surface_forms: Russian as a compulsory language study
description_wiki: Russian is an East Slavic language belonging to the Balto-Slavic branch of the Indo-European language family.

description: independent agency and volunteer program run by the United States Government
description_wiki: The Peace Corps is an independent agency and program of the United States government that trains and deploys volunteers to communities in partner countries around the world.
